title: SSH Tunnels
hint: Each enabled tunnel opens a SOCKS5 listener at its configured listen address and local port. Point a socks5 node in your profile at that address to route traffic through SSH.

importDialog.title: Import Tunnel Servers
importDialog.warning: Importing will clear all existing SSH servers and replace them with the ones from this URL. Tunnels will start or stop according to each server's status in the file. This cannot be undone.

exportDialog.title: Export Tunnel Servers
exportDialog.passphrasePlaceholder: Used to encrypt the config file
exportDialog.hint: All servers (including passwords) are encrypted with this passphrase (Argon2id + AES-256-GCM) into a portable file you can host and import elsewhere. Keep the passphrase safe — it cannot be recovered if lost.

field.name: Name
field.listenHostWarning: This listen address can be reached by devices beyond this machine. Use it only on trusted networks with firewall or access controls in place.
